# 05_EVALUATE_PROPOSAL_QUALITY

## KEYWORDS
`quality` `evaluation` `assessment` `review` `иҙЁйҮҸиҜ„д»·` `е®Ңж•ҙжҖ§жЈҖжҹҘ` `ж”№иҝӣе»әи®®`

---

## TASK
Evaluate proposal across 7 dimensions вҶ’ identify gaps вҶ’ prioritize fixes

## INPUT
- Draft or final proposal document
- Bidding document (scoring criteria + requirements)

## OUTPUT
```json
{
  "scores": {completeness, accuracy, logic, professionalism, credibility, competitiveness, compliance},
  "total_score": 0-100,
  "grade": "A/B/C/D/F",
  "critical_issues": [{issue, impact, fix}],
  "improvements": [{priority, area, suggestion}],
  "ready_to_submit": true/false
}
```

---

## QUALITY_7_DIMENSIONS

```
Dimension      | Weight | Max Score | What to Check
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Completeness   | 25%    | 25        | All required items present?
Accuracy       | 20%    | 20        | Content correct, no errors?
Logic          | 15%    | 15        | Flow and coherence OK?
Professional   | 15%    | 15        | Terminology, depth, tone?
Credibility    | 10%    | 10        | Evidence, proof, examples?
Competitiveness| 10%    | 10        | Differentiation, value prop?
Compliance     | 5%     | 5         | Format, signatures, specs?
